A third consecutive spring Tenno Sho is on the line for 
Mejiro McQueen, and all of Kyoto is cheering her on!

History is within her grasp! She's running proudly in fourth 
position now!
…I can feel her presence behind me. Just like in training.

But this is the real thing, a real race… And everything is on 
the line for me!
I will be victorious!

And they're past the backstretch and into the third corner! 
The pace is heating up as they glide down the Yodo slope!
I'm just getting started!
I can hear her breathing… her heartbeat.
Follow McQueen… Just keep following!

And moving up right behind Mejiro McQueen is Rice 
Shower!
No! The gap isn't widening?!

It's Mejiro McQueen leading the way as they round the 
final corner and turn for home!

But from the outside it's Rice Shower! She has the leader in 
her sights, inching closer and closer!

I remember now how much running means to me. I just want 
to run… and win.
This race is mine!
Yaaahhhhh!

She breaks past! Rice Shower takes the lead! She's finally 
caught Mejiro McQueen!
Yaaaahhhhhh!\n
\nBut McQueen won't back down without a fight!
Will she get her third win?! Or will Rice Shower prevail?!

But Rice Shower! Rice Shower pulls away from Mejiro 
McQueen!

And Rice Shower's done it! Mejiro McQueen follows in 
second!
The winner of the spring Tenno Sho is Rice Shower!
